recommendations.title: Only the Brave
recommendations.overview: Members of the Granite Mountain Hotshots battle deadly wildfires to save an Arizona town.

recommendations.title: F1
recommendations.overview: Racing legend Sonny Hayes is coaxed out of retirement to lead a struggling Formula 1 team—and mentor a young hotshot driver—while chasing one more chance at glory.

recommendations.title: Top Gun
recommendations.overview: For Lieutenant Pete 'Maverick' Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick 'Goose' Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy, as well as personal demons, will threaten Pete's dreams of

recommendations.title: Spiderhead
recommendations.overview: A prisoner in a state-of-the-art penitentiary begins to question the purpose of the emotion-controlling drugs he's testing for a pharmaceutical genius.

recommendations.title: TRON: Legacy
recommendations.overview: Sam Flynn, the tech-savvy and daring son of Kevin Flynn, investigates his father's disappearance and is pulled into The Grid. With the help of a mysterious program named Quorra, Sam quests to stop evil dictator Clu from crossing into the real world.

recommendations.title: Oblivion
recommendations.overview: Jack Harper is one of the last few drone repairmen stationed on Earth. Part of a massive operation to extract vital resources after decades of war with a terrifying threat known as the Scavs, Jack’s mission is nearly complete. His existence is brough

recommendations.title: Ambush
recommendations.overview: When a small outpost is ambushed, a US Army squad must take the battle below ground on a high-stakes mission in a new type of warfare the likes of which they have never seen.

recommendations.title: Green Street Hooligans
recommendations.overview: After being wrongfully expelled from Harvard University, American Matt Buckner flees to his sister's home in England. Once there, he is befriended by her charming and dangerous brother-in-law, Pete Dunham, and introduced to the underworld of British

recommendations.title: Extraction
recommendations.overview: A hardened gun-for-hire's latest mission becomes a soul-searching race to survive when he's sent into Bangladesh to rescue a drug lord's kidnapped son.

recommendations.title: Miss Sloane
recommendations.overview: An ambitious lobbyist faces off against the powerful gun lobby in an attempt to pass gun control legislation.
